overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from a cinematic video game (resembling Red Dead Redemption 2) showing a character in a long coat walking through a snowy mountain trail at night. The scene features atmospheric blue moonlight contrasted with warm lantern posts along the path, creating a moody winter atmosphere as the character carries a large object toward a distant settlement.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain trail with wooden fencing and pine trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the snowy path carrying a large dark object, moving away from the camera

entered.detail: weathered wooden fence running parallel to the left side of the trail
tall pine tree with snow-covered branches leaning over the path
black metal post with warm yellow lantern light illuminating the snow
snow-dusted rocky outcrops visible in the distance on the right

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a narrow snowy trail at night, bordered by a wooden fence on the left and a large leaning pine tree. The character walks away from the camera along the path, heading toward a distant lantern glow. The environment is quiet and isolated, with snow covering the ground and rocks visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain pass with illuminated lantern posts

events.description: small white animal scurries across the snow in the path ahead of the character

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding mountain path, passing close to warm lantern posts on the right

entered.detail: large dark rocky cliff face covered in snow rising on the right side of the path
dark wooden structure with snow-covered roof visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The trail continues through a more rugged section of the mountain, with a rocky cliff rising on the right. The character passes several lantern posts that cast warm pools of light on the snow. A small white animal briefly appears on the path ahead. A distant wooden building becomes visible on the right as the path curves.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snowy approach to distant settlement

agents.ego_description: approaching a distant lit structure at the end of the trail, maintaining steady pace through deeper snow

entered.detail: building with warm lights visible in the distance at the end of the path
expansive snow-covered area opening up on the left side of the trail

segments.scene_description: The terrain opens up into a wider area as the character approaches a distant building with warm lights. The rocky cliff falls away behind, replaced by open snow fields on the left. The path continues toward the settlement, with the character maintaining a steady walking pace through the deep snow.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a narrow mountain trail that gradually opens into a wider, illuminated settlement area. It begins on a secluded snowy path bordered by a wooden fence and a leaning pine tree, following a character walking away from the camera toward a distant glow. As the path curves, the environment becomes more rugged with a rocky cliff rising on the right and warm pools of light cast by passing lantern posts, briefly interrupted by a small white animal on the trail. The scene then expands as the cliff falls away, shifting from the enclosed mountain pass to open snow fields on the left. Finally, the camera tracks the character's steady pace through the deep snow as they approach a distant building radiating warm light.
